summary: Auto-Reminders System Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend Reminders tab fully functional with all 6 toggle switches working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: schedule/cancel reminder endpoints were using wrong collection (lodging_bookings instead of bookings)
Reminders auto-schedule when booking is confirmed (line 1403 in moego.py)
Reminders auto-schedule when booking is approved by admin (line 1508 in moego.py)
Push notifications may not deliver if user hasn't subscribed to web push (MOCKED)
Default preferences: 24h check-in/out enabled, 2h check-out disabled, booking confirmations enabled

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Reminders tab renders correctly with all toggles functional

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Reminders feature fully tested. All reminder preference endpoints working. Reminders auto-schedule on booking confirmation/approval. Push notifications MOCKED (requires browser subscription).

toggle_interaction.details: Toggles update preferences via API and show toast notification

info_card.details: How reminders work info card displayed

bugs_fixed.issue: schedule/cancel reminder endpoints used wrong MongoDB collection (lodging_bookings instead of bookings)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use db.bookings collection to match main booking system

mocked_apis.push_notifications: MOCKED - Web Push requires browser subscription
